awattar   /  **claude-code-best-practices**  Public. # awattar/claude-code-best-practices. # 🧠 Claude Code Best Practices. A practical guide to using Claude Code, Anthropic’s agentic coding assistant, effectively in real-world development workflows. This repo distills best practices, patterns, and examples for integrating Claude Code into your terminal-based coding environment. Claude Code is a command-line tool that gives you direct access to Claude’s reasoning and coding capabilities. It’s designed for agentic coding - where Claude autonomously explores, edits, and explains code across your project. Think of it as a collaborative AI pair programmer that understands your repo structure, coding conventions, and workflows. + How to configure your environment for Claude Code. Claude Code is optimized for agentic coding - AI that acts with autonomy and awareness:. This repository includes a collection of custom slash commands designed to streamline development workflows with Claude Code. Automatically generates comprehensive CLAUDE.md files for any project by analyzing project structure, technology stack, and development patterns.

Image 1: Agentic Data Science & Engineering ##### **July 20–24 | Direct the agents.** **Compound the work.** Register for Free. # Claude Code Best Practices: Planning, Context Transfer, TDD. Learn Claude Code best practices from production teams. Use plan mode, CLAUDE.md files, and test-driven development to make the most of Claude's context window. *   Claude Code Best Practices FAQs. Claude Code rewards a kind of discipline that most developer tools don't ask for. If you've been using it for a while, you've noticed that some sessions produce exactly what you want, and others burn through tokens going nowhere. Anthropic's own teamfound that unguided attempts succeed about 33% of the time, and the tool's creatorabandons 10-20% of sessions. You have Claude draft a `plan.md`, open it in your editor, and add inline notes wherever Claude made the wrong call or left something ambiguous: "use `drizzle:generate`, not raw SQL" or "this should be `PATCH`, not `PUT`.".

Claude Code Best Practices: Anthropic's Engineering Guide, Read and Highlighted
Anthropic's Claude Code guide read line by line: manage context, give it a check to verify, explore then plan then code.

How do you get the most out of Claude Code? We read Anthropic's engineering guide together and highlight the practices that matter: why the context window is the resource to manage, giving the model a check it can run to verify its work, asking for evidence instead of claims, and the explore-plan-code workflow with plan mode.

Enroll in the full course: https://https://standarity.com/

Topics covered in this video:
  - Manage the context window
  - Give it a way to verify
  - Explore, plan, then code
  - Be specific; point to patterns

Instructor: Standarity

This video provides a comprehensive overview of the key concepts, frameworks, and implementation steps covered in the full Udemy course. Whether you're preparing for certification or looking to implement best practices in your organization, this preview will give you a solid foundation.

title: 💻 Claude Code - Best Practices
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# Claude Code - Best Practices. The three most impactful practices to improve your productivity with Claude Code are: configuring a CLAUDE.md file with your project conventions, structuring your prompts with precise context, and leveraging plan mode before each complex task. Claude Code best practices consist of a set of concrete recommendations for maximizing the efficiency of this development agent directly in your terminal. Key takeaway: these 10 practices cover three areas - configuration, communication, and workflow - which form the foundation of effective Claude Code usage. Key takeaway: plan mode transforms Claude Code from an executor into an architect - use it whenever the task goes beyond a single file. 60% of Claude Code support tickets come from the "ghost context" anti-pattern - a simple CLAUDE.md file resolves the issue in most cases. If you want to structure these workflows professionally, the [SFEIR Institute Claude Code training](/en/training/claude-code-training/) guides you in 1 intensive day through hands-on labs covering each of these best practices.

Use when the user wants to create one or many images from data (CSV/list), reuse a visual template with different texts/photos, or batch-produce cards for a marketplace, social network, or event. Manages Discord operations including messaging, reactions, and channel management directly through Claude. Browse the MCP Market to get started. The Batch Processing skill for Claude Code empowers developers to handle high-volume tasks—such as reviewing dozens of files or processing hundreds of documents—without linear increases in time or token costs. It provides a strategic framework for selecting the optimal execution method based on scale: utilizing agent swarms for rapid parallel processing of 5-20 items, the Anthropic API Batch for 50% cost savings on massive datasets, or sequential loops for tasks with complex dependencies. Sync skills to **Claude Cowork**, **Claude Code**, **Codex**, and more.

title: 💻 What Is Claude Code /simplify and /batch? The Built-In Commands That Fix Overengineering | MindStudio
content:
Claude Code 技术干货

# What Is Claude Code /simplify and /batch? Claude Code's /simplify and /batch commands help you clean up bloated code and run large refactors in parallel. Claude Code tackles this with two commands worth knowing: `/simplify` and `/batch`. The `/batch` command lets you run operations across multiple files simultaneously, so large refactors don’t require running the same prompt over and over. Here’s how both work and when to use them. ## What Claude Code Is. Claude Code is Anthropic’s terminal-based AI coding assistant. It connects to your codebase through the file system, which means it can see the actual state of your project rather than relying on what you paste into a chat window. Instead of writing a long prompt explaining what you want, you type a command and Claude handles the task with the right behavior built in. When you run `/simplify` on a file or function, Claude Code evaluates:.

The toolkit reads `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` from `~/.claude/env`. #### Step 6: Register the MCP server in `~/.claude.json`. #### Step 7 *(optional)*: Configure the statusline in `~/.claude/settings.json`.
